{
 "cells": [
  {
   "cell_type": "markdown",
   "id": "69a6ba47",
   "metadata": {},
   "source": [
    "# A gallery of cavity shapes\n",
    "\n",
    "cavsim2d is not limited to elliptical cavities. Every geometry — elliptical, **flat-top**, **spline (Bezier)**, **RF gun**, pillbox — builds a common `profile()` and so shares the *same* API: `cav.eigenmode.run(...)`, `cav.tune`, `cav.wakefield`, UQ and optimisation all work unchanged. This notebook builds three shapes not shown elsewhere and solves each fundamental mode through the identical call."
   ]
  },
  {
   "cell_type": "code",
   "execution_count": 1,
   "id": "682d403b",
   "metadata": {
    "execution": {
     "iopub.execute_input": "2026-07-19T20:09:54.418692Z",
     "iopub.status.busy": "2026-07-19T20:09:54.418512Z",
     "iopub.status.idle": "2026-07-19T20:09:56.174903Z",
     "shell.execute_reply": "2026-07-19T20:09:56.173988Z"
    }
   },
   "outputs": [],
   "source": [
    "import os, tempfile\n",
    "import numpy as np\n",
    "import pandas as pd\n",
    "import matplotlib.pyplot as plt\n",
    "from cavsim2d import Study, EllipticalCavityFlatTop, SplineCavity, RFGun\n",
    "from cavsim2d.utils.style import apply_style\n",
    "apply_style()\n",
    "\n",
    "def fundamental(cav, name):\n",
    "    '''Solve the monopole and return the fundamental freq + R/Q as a row.'''\n",
    "    study = Study(os.path.join(tempfile.mkdtemp(), name))\n",
    "    study.add_cavity([cav], [name])\n",
    "    study.run_eigenmode({'processes': 1, 'boundary_conditions': 'mm',\n",
    "                         'mesh_config': {'h': 10, 'p': 2}})\n",
    "    q = cav.eigenmode.qois\n",
    "    return {'freq [MHz]': q['freq [MHz]'], 'R/Q [Ohm]': q['R/Q [Ohm]'],\n",
    "            'Epk/Eacc []': q['Epk/Eacc []']}"
   ]
  },
  {
   "cell_type": "markdown",
   "id": "6312c9c4",
   "metadata": {},
   "source": [
    "## 1. Flat-top elliptical\n",
    "\n",
    "An elliptical cell with a straight flat section at the equator — eight parameters `[A, B, a, b, Ri, L, Req, l]`, the last being the flat length."
   ]
  },
  {
   "cell_type": "code",
   "execution_count": 2,
   "id": "f67d1f4b",
   "metadata": {
    "execution": {
     "iopub.execute_input": "2026-07-19T20:09:56.177352Z",
     "iopub.status.busy": "2026-07-19T20:09:56.177083Z",
     "iopub.status.idle": "2026-07-19T20:09:56.307262Z",
     "shell.execute_reply": "2026-07-19T20:09:56.306725Z"
    }
   },
   "outputs": [
    {
     "data": {
      "image/png": "",
      "text/plain": [
       "<Figure size 800x300 with 1 Axes>"
      ]
     },
     "metadata": {},
     "output_type": "display_data"
    },
    {
     "data": {
      "text/plain": [
       "<Axes: xlabel='$z$ [mm]', ylabel='$r$ [mm]'>"
      ]
     },
     "execution_count": 2,
     "metadata": {},
     "output_type": "execute_result"
    }
   ],
   "source": [
    "ft = [62.22, 66.13, 30.22, 23.11, 80, 93.5, 171.20, 20]\n",
    "flat = EllipticalCavityFlatTop(1, ft, ft, ft, beampipe='none', name='flattop')\n",
    "flat.plot('geometry')"
   ]
  },
  {
   "cell_type": "code",
   "execution_count": 3,
   "id": "98c96110",
   "metadata": {
    "execution": {
     "iopub.execute_input": "2026-07-19T20:09:56.309333Z",
     "iopub.status.busy": "2026-07-19T20:09:56.309150Z",
     "iopub.status.idle": "2026-07-19T20:09:59.989273Z",
     "shell.execute_reply": "2026-07-19T20:09:59.988761Z"
    }
   },
   "outputs": [
    {
     "data": {
      "text/plain": [
       "{'freq [MHz]': 796.3470914042377,\n",
       " 'R/Q [Ohm]': 94.78932536488439,\n",
       " 'Epk/Eacc []': 2.136414777989721}"
      ]
     },
     "execution_count": 3,
     "metadata": {},
     "output_type": "execute_result"
    }
   ],
   "source": [
    "row_ft = fundamental(flat, 'flattop'); row_ft"
   ]
  },
  {
   "cell_type": "markdown",
   "id": "e8e702e2",
   "metadata": {},
   "source": [
    "## 2. Spline (Bezier) cavity\n",
    "\n",
    "A free-form wall defined by control points and fitted with a Bezier spline — for shapes the elliptical parameterisation can't express."
   ]
  },
  {
   "cell_type": "code",
   "execution_count": 4,
   "id": "28b8f532",
   "metadata": {
    "execution": {
     "iopub.execute_input": "2026-07-19T20:09:59.991088Z",
     "iopub.status.busy": "2026-07-19T20:09:59.990914Z",
     "iopub.status.idle": "2026-07-19T20:10:00.062253Z",
     "shell.execute_reply": "2026-07-19T20:10:00.061096Z"
    }
   },
   "outputs": [
    {
     "data": {
      "image/png": "",
      "text/plain": [
       "<Figure size 800x300 with 1 Axes>"
      ]
     },
     "metadata": {},
     "output_type": "display_data"
    },
    {
     "data": {
      "text/plain": [
       "<Axes: xlabel='$z$ [mm]', ylabel='$r$ [mm]'>"
      ]
     },
     "execution_count": 4,
     "metadata": {},
     "output_type": "execute_result"
    }
   ],
   "source": [
    "geom = {'p0': [0, 35], 'p1': [0, 70], 'p2': [30, 103],\n",
    "        'p3': [85, 103], 'p4': [115, 70], 'p5': [115, 35]}\n",
    "spline = SplineCavity({'geometry': dict(geom)}, kind='Bezier')\n",
    "spline.name = 'spline'\n",
    "spline.plot('geometry')"
   ]
  },
  {
   "cell_type": "code",
   "execution_count": 5,
   "id": "031e8c1f",
   "metadata": {
    "execution": {
     "iopub.execute_input": "2026-07-19T20:10:00.064297Z",
     "iopub.status.busy": "2026-07-19T20:10:00.064045Z",
     "iopub.status.idle": "2026-07-19T20:10:02.992890Z",
     "shell.execute_reply": "2026-07-19T20:10:02.991662Z"
    }
   },
   "outputs": [
    {
     "data": {
      "text/plain": [
       "{'freq [MHz]': 1534.5573276089435,\n",
       " 'R/Q [Ohm]': 103.23637568995248,\n",
       " 'Epk/Eacc []': 6.313393732419441}"
      ]
     },
     "execution_count": 5,
     "metadata": {},
     "output_type": "execute_result"
    }
   ],
   "source": [
    "row_sp = fundamental(spline, 'spline'); row_sp"
   ]
  },
  {
   "cell_type": "markdown",
   "id": "bbcfe332",
   "metadata": {},
   "source": [
    "## 3. RF gun\n",
    "\n",
    "A photoinjector gun geometry (dimensions in metres, angles in radians) — a very different beast, but the same eigenmode call finds its VHF accelerating mode."
   ]
  },
  {
   "cell_type": "code",
   "execution_count": 6,
   "id": "7f30741f",
   "metadata": {
    "execution": {
     "iopub.execute_input": "2026-07-19T20:10:02.995051Z",
     "iopub.status.busy": "2026-07-19T20:10:02.994897Z",
     "iopub.status.idle": "2026-07-19T20:10:03.100275Z",
     "shell.execute_reply": "2026-07-19T20:10:03.099500Z"
    }
   },
   "outputs": [
    {
     "data": {
      "image/png": "",
      "text/plain": [
       "<Figure size 800x300 with 1 Axes>"
      ]
     },
     "metadata": {},
     "output_type": "display_data"
    },
    {
     "data": {
      "text/plain": [
       "<Axes: xlabel='$z$ [mm]', ylabel='$r$ [mm]'>"
      ]
     },
     "execution_count": 6,
     "metadata": {},
     "output_type": "execute_result"
    }
   ],
   "source": [
    "gun = {'geometry': {'y1': 1.5e-2, 'R2': 3e-2, 'T2': np.deg2rad(45), 'L3': 24e-2,\n",
    "                    'R4': 5e-2, 'L5': 11e-2, 'R6': 6e-2, 'L7': 19e-2, 'R8': 4e-2,\n",
    "                    'T9': np.deg2rad(8), 'R10': 3e-2, 'T10': np.deg2rad(40),\n",
    "                    'L11': 5e-2, 'R12': 3e-2, 'L13': 3e-2, 'R14': 3e-2, 'x': 1e-2}}\n",
    "rfgun = RFGun(gun); rfgun.name = 'rfgun'\n",
    "rfgun.plot('geometry')"
   ]
  },
  {
   "cell_type": "code",
   "execution_count": 7,
   "id": "2cebda18",
   "metadata": {
    "execution": {
     "iopub.execute_input": "2026-07-19T20:10:03.102227Z",
     "iopub.status.busy": "2026-07-19T20:10:03.102048Z",
     "iopub.status.idle": "2026-07-19T20:10:07.074117Z",
     "shell.execute_reply": "2026-07-19T20:10:07.073400Z"
    }
   },
   "outputs": [
    {
     "data": {
      "text/plain": [
       "{'freq [MHz]': 213.06834851302116,\n",
       " 'R/Q [Ohm]': 133.66762013858826,\n",
       " 'Epk/Eacc []': 16.866599375611564}"
      ]
     },
     "execution_count": 7,
     "metadata": {},
     "output_type": "execute_result"
    }
   ],
   "source": [
    "row_gun = fundamental(rfgun, 'rfgun'); row_gun"
   ]
  },
  {
   "cell_type": "markdown",
   "id": "e3fe5fb3",
   "metadata": {},
   "source": [
    "## The same API, four geometries\n",

   "source": [
    "## Where to go next\n",
    "\n",
    "- [The TESLA elliptical cavity](elliptical_tesla.ipynb) and [the pillbox / circular waveguide](pillbox.ipynb).\n",
    "- Every one of these types also tunes, runs wakefields, and takes a `uq_config` — see [Eigenmode under uncertainty](../advanced/eigenmode_uq.ipynb) (spline + RF gun) and [Robust tuning](../advanced/robust_tuning.ipynb) (flat-top)."
   ]
